author: Anand Baghel
description: A scientific calculator. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: GATE Calculator

releases.author: anandrajbaghel
releases.description:
# GATE Calculator v1.0.1

First public release of **GATE Calculator** — a floating scientific calculator for Obsidian.

## ✨ Features

- Floating, draggable calculator widget
- Scientific functions for engineering, mathematics, and general calculations
- Degree and Radian modes
- Trigonometric and inverse trigonometric functions
- Hyperbolic functions
- Logarithms and arbitrary base logarithms
- Powers, roots, exponentials, and factorial
- Memory operations (MC, MR, MS, M+, M−)
- Keyboard input support
- Command Palette integration
- Optional Ribbon and Status Bar icons
- Light, Dark, and System themes
- Optional auto-close parentheses
- Customizable settings and hotkeys

## 🔒 Privacy

- Fully offline
- No telemetry
- No analytics
- No data collection

## 📦 Installation

Install directly from the Obsidian Community Plugins browser or download the release assets from GitHub.

---

Thank you to everyone who tries the plugin! Feedback, bug reports, and feature suggestions are always welcome.
releases.name: v1.0.1
